full_text:
Wang Rao 王饒
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Rao (王饒). Seized the headquarters of Yi and killed the Inspector Xi Jian. Wang Rao was affiliated with Yellow Scarves.
